since_last: 66% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.63%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC +0.00% · Gold -0.87% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 66% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.63%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.63%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.34%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +3.71%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +3.71%, ARM +3.37%, LSCC +3.04%, EQIX +2.82%, QCOM +2.27%. Laggards: MDB -2.07%, OKTA -1.80%, SAP -1.64%, NOW -1.19%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.76% at $157.29
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.76% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
